name: Mannadium Trisukta
name_jp: マナドゥム・トリロスークタ
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can target 1 Level 2 Tuner in your GY; Special Summon it, but negate its effects. You can target any number of Tuners you control; change their Levels to 2, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use each effect of "Mannadium Trisukta" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters

You can target any number of Tuners you control; change their Levels to 2, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use each effect of "Mannadium Trisukta" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
